response.overview: After the baby’s mother is killed by criminals seeking revenge against her father for his fight against corruption, the girl is left alone, freezing in a cradle abandoned in the snow. Her neighbor Askar accidentally finds her, barely alive, in the snowy yard. Realizing that every second counts, he rushes to save her, unaware that the danger is not over yet. The film explores themes of parental love, resilience, and the value of life in a world falling apart.
response.title: BESIK (CRADLE)
